# Vosthermos — Complete Reference for AI Crawlers

> Vosthermos is a Quebec-based company specializing in residential and commercial door and window repair. Founded in 2010, we have over 15 years of hands-on experience restoring, repairing, and replacing components of doors and windows across the greater Montreal area. We operate the only dedicated online parts store in Quebec with 740+ replacement parts for all major brands.

---

## Company Overview

Vosthermos was founded to address a gap in the Quebec market: affordable, professional door and window repair as an alternative to costly full replacements. Based in Saint-Francois-Xavier-de-Brompton, Quebec, the company serves the entire greater Montreal region within a 100km radius, including Montreal, Laval, Longueuil, Brossard, Boucherville, Saint-Hyacinthe, Granby, Saint-Jean-sur-Richelieu, Chambly, Terrebonne, Repentigny, Blainville, Chateauguay, La Prairie, Sainte-Julie, Varennes, Delson, Candiac, Saint-Bruno, and Mascouche.

### Contact Information
- Address: 330 Ch. St-Francois-Xavier, Local 104, Saint-Francois-Xavier-de-Brompton, QC J5B 1C9
- Phone: 514-825-8411
- Email: info@vosthermos.com
- Website: https://www.vosthermos.com
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=61562303553558
- Instagram: https://instagram.com/vosthermos/
- Hours: Monday to Friday, 8:00 AM to 5:00 PM
- Languages: French and English

---

## Services in Detail

### 1. Sealed Glass (Thermos) Replacement
URL: https://www.vosthermos.com/services/remplacement-vitre-thermos
Starting price: $150/unit installed

A "thermos" (also called a sealed unit or insulating glass unit) consists of two or three glass panes separated by an airtight spacer filled with argon gas. When the sealant degrades over time, humidity penetrates between the panes, causing permanent fogging. Replacing only the sealed unit is 60-70% cheaper than replacing the entire window.

Our replacement thermos units use Low-E glass with argon gas, meeting or exceeding Energy Star standards. We offer a 10-year warranty on all thermos replacements, which is transferable to the next property owner.

Process: Free on-site measurement visit, custom fabrication (2-3 weeks), professional installation (under 1 hour per window).

### 2. Hardware Replacement
URL: https://www.vosthermos.com/services/remplacement-quincaillerie
Starting price: $4.99/piece

We stock over 700 hardware parts compatible with major Quebec brands: Novatech, Lepage Millwork, Fenplast, Jeld-Wen, and Kohltech. We replace handles, locks, rollers, crank operators, hinges, spring balances, locking mechanisms, and strike plates.

Defective hardware compromises home security, reduces energy efficiency, and makes daily use of doors and windows difficult. A simple roller replacement can restore a patio door that hasn't slid properly in years.

### 3. Wooden Door Repair
URL: https://www.vosthermos.com/services/reparation-portes-bois
Starting price: Free consultation

We offer complete restoration services for wooden doors and window frames: sanding, filling, painting/staining, weatherstripping replacement, and hardware replacement. Common problems include wood swelling from humidity, cracks from freeze-thaw cycles, peeling paint, deteriorated joints, and rusted hardware.

Repair is almost always more economical and ecological than replacement. A quality wooden door can last decades with proper maintenance.

### 4. Custom Screen Doors (Moustiquaires)
URL: https://www.vosthermos.com/services/moustiquaires-sur-mesure
Starting price: $25/unit

We fabricate custom screen doors for all window and door types: sliding, fixed frame, retractable, and patio door screens. We use premium fiberglass mesh and anodized aluminum frames. We also offer pet screen (7x more resistant than standard), ideal for homes with cats and dogs.

Screen mesh replacement is available without replacing the entire frame. Typical fabrication time: 3-5 business days.

### 5. Caulking
URL: https://www.vosthermos.com/services/calfeutrage
Starting price: $8/linear foot

Professional caulking is the first line of defense against cold air infiltration, rain, and snowmelt. In Quebec, where temperatures can drop below -30C, failing caulking can cause significant heat loss. Professional caulking lasts 10-15 years.

We use professional-grade polyurethane or hybrid silicone sealants certified for northern climates. Our process includes complete removal of old caulking, thorough surface cleaning, and professional application with proper tooling.

### 6. Defogging
URL: https://www.vosthermos.com/services/desembuage
Starting price: $65/unit

An economical alternative to full thermos replacement. We clean the interior of fogged sealed units, inject argon gas, and reseal. The process involves micro-perforations in the outer glass, specialized cleaning solvent injection, hot air drying, argon injection, and UV sealant closure.

Three types of fog: dry fog (mineral halo, most common, best results), wet fog (active moisture infiltration), and hazy fog (combination, case-by-case evaluation). Defogging costs 40-60% less than replacement. 5-year warranty included.

### 7. Door Inserts
URL: https://www.vosthermos.com/services/insertion-porte
Starting price: $200 (insert + installation)

Transform your front door's appearance without replacing the entire door. We work with top manufacturers: Novatech, Verre Select, and Vitre-Art. Hundreds of models from classic to contemporary, with clear, frosted, textured, beveled, or tinted glass options.

Modern inserts feature double glass with argon and Low-E coating for excellent energy performance. We also replace sidelight and transom panels for a unified look. Custom fabrication: 2-4 weeks.

### 8. Weatherstripping (Coupe-froid)
URL: https://www.vosthermos.com/services/coupe-froid
Starting price: $5/linear foot

Weatherstripping is the flexible material (foam, rubber, silicone, brush, or vinyl) that seals the gap between the fixed frame and the moving part of doors and windows. Replacing weatherstripping can reduce heating costs by 10-15%.

We carry all types: compressive foam, EPDM rubber, silicone, brush (for sliding windows), tubular vinyl, and door sweeps. We stock profiles for all popular Quebec brands. Weatherstripping should be replaced every 5-8 years.

---

## Online Parts Store

URL: https://www.vosthermos.com/boutique

Our online store offers 740+ replacement parts for doors and windows. Categories include:
- Patio door rollers and carriages
- Handles and locks
- Crank operators for casement windows
- Hinges and friction stays
- Spring balances for double-hung windows
- Weatherstripping and door sweeps
- Screen door hardware and mesh
- Locking mechanisms and strike plates
- Door closers

All parts are compatible with major brands sold in Quebec: Novatech, Lepage Millwork, Fenplast, Jeld-Wen, and Kohltech. Parts can be purchased online with shipping across Quebec, or picked up at our location.

## Warranty Details

URL: https://www.vosthermos.com/garantie

- 10-year warranty on all thermos (sealed glass) replacements, covering manufacturing defects and loss of seal integrity
- 5-year warranty on defogging services
- Warranty on labor varies by service type and is detailed in each written estimate
- Thermos warranty is transferable to the next property owner upon home sale
- RBQ License: 5790-9498-01

---

## Diagnostic Tool

URL: https://www.vosthermos.com/diagnostic

A free interactive tool that helps homeowners diagnose window and door problems. Users answer a series of questions about symptoms (fogging, drafts, difficulty opening/closing, condensation, etc.) and receive personalized recommendations for the appropriate repair service.

---

## Energy Savings Calculator

URL: https://www.vosthermos.com/calculateur-economies

An interactive calculator that estimates energy savings from replacing old thermos units with modern Low-E + argon sealed glass. Users input the number and size of windows, current glass type, and heating system to receive estimated annual savings in dollars and energy consumption.

---

## Technical Glossary (46 Terms)

URL: https://www.vosthermos.com/glossaire

### Glass and Glazing
- **Vitre thermos (sealed unit)**: Unit of glass composed of two or three panes separated by an airtight spacer filled with argon gas. Provides thermal and acoustic insulation.
- **Verre Low-E (Low-E glass)**: Glass coated with microscopic metallic oxides that reflect infrared heat. Improves energy efficiency by 30-40%.
- **Gaz argon**: Inert gas injected between thermos panes. 34% denser than air, slows heat transfer by convection.
- **Espaceur (spacer/intercalaire)**: Piece separating thermos panes. Modern "warm edge" spacers reduce thermal bridging.
- **Double vitrage (double glazing)**: Two glass panes with argon-filled space. Standard in Quebec since the 1980s.
- **Triple vitrage (triple glazing)**: Three glass panes with two argon spaces. Superior insulation for north-facing facades.
- **Desembuage (defogging)**: Process of drilling small holes in thermos to evacuate trapped humidity, then resealing. Temporary 3-5 year solution.
- **Verre trempe (tempered glass)**: Glass heated then rapidly cooled, 4-5x stronger than regular glass. Shatters into small non-cutting pieces.
- **Verre lamine (laminated glass)**: Two panes bonded by plastic interlayer (PVB). Pieces stay attached when broken. Used for security and soundproofing.
- **Coefficient de gain solaire (SHGC)**: Measures solar energy transmitted through a window. Low SHGC blocks summer heat; high SHGC lets in winter warmth.

### Hardware
- **Quincaillerie de fenetre**: All mechanical parts: handles, latches, hinges, crank operators, cam locks, springs. Individually replaceable.
- **Roulette de porte-patio**: Rollers under patio doors enabling sliding. Wear out after 10-15 years. Most common and effective repair.
- **Manivelle de fenetre (crank operator)**: Gear mechanism for opening casement and awning windows. Common wear part.
- **Came de verrouillage (cam lock)**: Eccentric piece that pulls window tight against frame for airtight seal.
- **Gache (strike plate)**: Metal piece in frame that receives the latch or cam lock.
- **Charniere a friction**: Special hinge for casement windows that holds window open at any angle.
- **Balance a ressort (spiral balance)**: Spring mechanism in double-hung windows counterbalancing panel weight.
- **Ferme-porte (door closer)**: Hydraulic device that automatically closes doors at controlled speed.
- **Serrure multipoint (multipoint lock)**: Locking system engaging door at multiple frame points simultaneously.

### Weatherproofing
- **Coupe-froid (weatherstripping)**: Flexible seal ensuring airtightness. Lasts 5-10 years. Available in foam, rubber, silicone, brush.
- **Calfeutrage (caulking)**: Flexible sealant applied around frames to prevent air and water infiltration. Must be redone every 5-7 years in Quebec.
- **Coupe-bise (door sweep)**: Seal at bottom of door preventing cold air entry between door and threshold.
- **Solin (flashing)**: Metal piece above windows/doors deflecting rainwater. Missing flashing is a common cause of water infiltration.
- **Mousse expansive (expanding foam)**: Spray insulating foam filling spaces between window frame and wall structure.
- **Condensation sur les fenetres**: Water droplets on glass surfaces. Interior condensation indicates high humidity or poor insulation. Condensation between panes signals a defective thermos.

### Window Types
- **Fenetre a battant (casement window)**: Side-hinged, opens outward via crank. Very popular in Quebec for excellent airtightness.
- **Fenetre a guillotine (double-hung)**: Bottom panel slides up. Very common in Montreal triplexes and duplexes. Spring balances wear out.
- **Fenetre coulissante (sliding window)**: Panels slide horizontally on rails. Common in suburban homes.
- **Fenetre a auvent (awning window)**: Top-hinged, opens outward from bottom. Can stay open in light rain.
- **Fenetre fixe (fixed window)**: Does not open. No moving hardware. Only issue: thermos fogging or breaking.
- **Porte-patio (patio door)**: Large glazed sliding door. Subject to roller, handle, and lock wear. Most problems solved without full replacement.
- **Fenetre oscillo-battant (tilt and turn)**: European dual-mode window. Tilts inward from top for ventilation or opens fully as side-hung casement.

### Door Inserts
- **Insertion de porte (door insert)**: Decorative glazed panel for front doors. Available in clear, frosted, textured, or decorative iron patterns. Replaceable without changing the door.

### Screen Doors
- **Moustiquaire (screen)**: Frame with fine mesh for windows/doors. Available in fiberglass (standard), aluminum, or pet screen.
- **Pet screen**: Screen mesh 7x more resistant than standard fiberglass. Designed to withstand cat and dog claws.

### Energy Efficiency
- **Cote Energy Star**: Certification program for energy-efficient windows. Zone 3 recommended for Quebec.
- **Coefficient U (U-factor)**: Measures heat transfer through a window. Lower is better. Good modern thermos: U < 1.4.
- **Valeur R (R-value)**: Inverse of U-factor. Measures thermal resistance. Higher is better. Double glazing with argon and Low-E: R 3-4.
- **Pont thermique (thermal bridge)**: Zone where heat escapes more easily, typically at glass perimeter. Modern warm-edge spacers and good caulking reduce thermal bridges.

### Wood Repair
- **Reparation a l'epoxy**: Epoxy resin technique to fill and harden rotted wood without replacing the entire piece.
- **Greffe de bois (wood splicing)**: Removing rotted section and replacing with new wood piece, glued and fitted precisely.

### Programs and Regulations
- **Programme OPTI-FENETRE**: Exclusive Vosthermos program bundling all repair services (thermos, hardware, weatherstripping, caulking, screens) into a turnkey package. Saves up to 70% vs. full window replacement.
- **RBQ (Regie du batiment du Quebec)**: Government body overseeing construction in Quebec. Vosthermos holds license 5790-9498-01.
- **Garantie legale (GCR)**: Quebec residential construction warranty. Vosthermos offers 10-year warranty on thermos, plus labor warranty.

### Measurements
- **Pied carre (square foot)**: Unit for thermos surface. Price per sq ft: $8-$25 depending on glass type. Formula: width (in) x height (in) / 144.
- **Pied lineaire (linear foot)**: Unit for caulking. Price per linear foot: $8-$20. Measured around window perimeter.

---

## Frequently Asked Questions

### Services
**Q: What services does Vosthermos offer?**
A: Complete range of door and window repair: thermos replacement, wooden door restoration, custom screen doors, hardware replacement (handles, locks, rollers, etc.), defogging, caulking, weatherstripping, and door insert replacement. Service area: 100km radius around Saint-Francois-Xavier.

**Q: What is the difference between defogging and thermos replacement?**
A: Defogging removes trapped humidity without replacing the sealed unit. It is a temporary, less costly solution but does not fully restore insulating properties. Thermos replacement installs a brand-new sealed unit with optimal thermal insulation and a 10-year warranty.

**Q: Do you repair all window types?**
A: Yes. Sliding, casement, awning, fixed, double-hung, and basement windows. All materials: PVC, aluminum, wood, and hybrid.

**Q: Do you service commercial doors?**
A: Yes. Commercial entry doors, door closers, specialized hardware, and large-format thermos replacement. We schedule to minimize business interruptions.

### Pricing
**Q: How much does a thermos replacement cost?**
A: Starting at $150, varying by dimensions, glass type (double, triple, Low-E, argon), accessibility, and installation complexity. Free detailed estimate provided.

**Q: Are estimates free?**
A: Yes, all estimates are completely free with no obligation. Available by phone, email (with photos), or on-site visit.

**Q: Are there travel fees?**
A: No travel fees within the greater Montreal region and 100km radius of Saint-Francois-Xavier. Fees beyond this zone are communicated in advance.

### Warranty
**Q: What is your warranty duration?**
A: 10 years on thermos replacements (manufacturing defects and seal integrity). 5 years on defogging. Other services: warranty varies by type and is specified in writing.

**Q: Is the warranty transferable?**
A: Yes, the thermos warranty transfers to the new owner upon property sale. The new owner contacts us with the original invoice number.

### Online Store
**Q: Can I buy parts and install them myself?**
A: Absolutely. All 740+ parts are available in our online store or in-person. Many hardware repairs are accessible to handy homeowners. We provide guidance.

**Q: Do you ship across Quebec?**
A: Yes, we ship all parts across Quebec. Local pickup is also available at our Saint-Francois-Xavier location.

---

## Brands We Work With

Our parts and services are compatible with the following manufacturers commonly found in Quebec homes:
- Novatech
- Lepage Millwork
- Fenplast
- Jeld-Wen
- Kohltech
- Verre Select
- Vitre-Art

---

## Why Repair Instead of Replace?

Repairing doors and windows is almost always more economical and ecological than full replacement. Key facts:
- Thermos replacement costs 60-70% less than full window replacement
- Defogging costs 40-60% less than thermos replacement
- Hardware replacement extends the life of existing doors and windows by years
- Repair conserves the existing frame, reducing waste and installation costs
- A well-maintained wooden door can last decades
- Professional caulking and weatherstripping provide immediate energy savings of 10-15% on heating costs

---

## Service Area Map

Vosthermos serves the following municipalities and surrounding areas:
Montreal, Laval, Longueuil, Brossard, Boucherville, Saint-Hyacinthe, Granby, Saint-Jean-sur-Richelieu, Chambly, Terrebonne, Repentigny, Blainville, Chateauguay, La Prairie, Sainte-Julie, Varennes, Delson, Candiac, Saint-Bruno-de-Montarville, Mascouche, Beloeil, Mont-Saint-Hilaire, Saint-Constant, Mercier, Beauharnois, Vaudreuil-Dorion, Joliette, and all municipalities within a 100km radius of Saint-Francois-Xavier-de-Brompton, QC.

---

## How to Get Started

1. Call 514-825-8411 or fill out the online contact form at https://www.vosthermos.com/#contact
2. Describe your problem or send photos of the affected door/window
3. Receive a free, no-obligation estimate
4. Schedule a convenient appointment for the repair
5. Enjoy your restored doors and windows with warranty coverage

For parts purchases, browse https://www.vosthermos.com/boutique and order directly online.
